# Resource (datadog_org_group)

Provides a Datadog Org Group resource. This can be used to create and manage Datadog organization groups.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "datadog_org_group" "example" {
  name = "Production Environments"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the org group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `owner_org_site` (String) The site of the organization that owns this org group.
- `owner_org_uuid` (String) The UUID of the organization that owns this org group.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import datadog_org_group.example <org_group_uuid>
```
